message:
feat(ffs-mvcc): add watermark API + active snapshot tracking for version GC (bd-3ie)

Add register_snapshot/release_snapshot ref-counted tracking, watermark()
to compute the safe prune boundary, and prune_safe() to GC versions no
longer needed by any active reader. Includes version_count() and
block_count_versioned() introspection helpers. Tests verify watermark
tracking, ref-counting, safe pruning semantics, and bounded memory
growth in long-running simulations (200 and 500 commit scenarios).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
